name: jiangyue-knowledge-curator
description: Codex skill plugin for curating confirmed Jiangyue website outputs, visual evidence, approved materials, failure cases, product fact boundaries, and competitor references into the local brand-system.

interface.shortDescription: Curate confirmed website knowledge and evidence.
interface.longDescription: A Jiangyue Technology Codex skill for collecting confirmed website task outputs, image failures, approved reference materials, product fact boundaries, visual standards, and competitor references into the local brand-system after user confirmation.
defaultPrompt: Use $jiangyue-knowledge-curator to organize confirmed Jiangyue outputs into the brand-system.
Use $jiangyue-knowledge-curator to turn a completed image task into a short curation card for user confirmation.
Use $jiangyue-knowledge-curator to update approved materials and failure cases after confirmation.
